name: Euro Cotton Slub Border Applique Decorative Throw Pillow White/Camel - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Square Indoor Pillow
description: Add simple elegance to your home decor with the Euro Cotton Slub Border Applique Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This white throw pillow features an applique border in a camel color for a touch of sophisticated style. Designed in a square shape, this 100% cotton throw pillow offers a soft and comfortable surface to rest your head and back. With the removable pillow cover, this euro throw pillow is easy to clean and maintain.
